aave-v3.adminKeyRisk: DAO-governed timelock, no single admin key
aave-v3.notes: Long production history across multiple chains without a protocol-level exploit.

uniswap-v3.adminKeyRisk: Core contracts largely immutable; governance controls fee switch only
uniswap-v3.notes: One of the most forked and scrutinized AMM designs in DeFi.

curve-finance.adminKeyRisk: DAO-governed, admin actions subject to timelock
curve-finance.notes: Had a high-profile Vyper compiler exploit in 2023 affecting some pools (not a Curve code bug per se) — worth surfacing to The Historian even though it's not a Curve-authored vulnerability.

gmx.notes: Native to Arbitrum — useful demo candidate if Arbitrum is one of the final demo chains.

compound-v3.notes: Mature lending protocol, deployed across Ethereum and several L2s.

example-unaudited-fork.adminKeyRisk: Single EOA admin key with no timelock (deployer wallet)
example-unaudited-fork.notes: Placeholder entry representing a typical low-effort fork for testing persona divergence against a clearly risky case.
